column1: Thu, 1 Nov 2001 11:27:32 -0800 (PST),"Germany, Chris","Fletcher, Brenda H.; Carter, Tamara",Tenn Transport,"Is the .02 commodity inclusive of ACA?

column2: Hodge, John; Singla, Kimat; Townsend, Judy

column1: We are buying the following Tenn transport from the pipeline for the winter.  I just did the deals so I don't have the contract numbers.

The Primary delivery point is CGAS - Broad Run.  The primary receipt point is meter #010698 in 500L.  We will be able to use any zone 1 receipt point but we only be able to use Broad Run as our delivery point."
